entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The legume crop used as the host for phloem-limited viruses.

entities.name: CALLUS CULTURE
entities.description: The use of undifferentiated plant cell masses for the maintenance of viruses.

entities.name: PHLOEM-LIMITED VIRUSES
entities.description: Viruses that are restricted to the phloem tissue of the host plant.

entities.name: STUNT-LIKE SYMPTOMS
entities.description: Physical growth inhibition observed in infected chickpea plants.

entities.name: DAS-ELISA
entities.description: Double antibody sandwich enzyme-linked immunosorbent assay used for virus detection.

entities.name: CHICKPEA CHLOROTIC DWARF MONOGEMINIVIRUS
entities.description: A specific phloem-limited virus denoted as CCDV.

entities.name: CHICKPEA LUTEOVIRUS
entities.description: A specific phloem-limited virus denoted as CpLV.

entities.name: TISSUE CULTURE
entities.description: The general technique of maintaining plant tissues in an artificial medium.

entities.name: OROSIUS ORIENTALIS
entities.description: A leafhopper species acting as a vector for CCDV.

entities.name: MYZUS PERSICAE
entities.description: An aphid species acting as a vector for CpLV.

entities.name: TRANSMISSION STUDIES
entities.description: Experiments conducted to verify the transfer of viruses from callus to healthy seedlings via vectors.
